id.description: Globally unique identifier of this context specific conformity profile. Typically represented as a URI SchemeOwner/profileID URI

name.description: Name of this conformity profile as defined by the scheme owner.

description.description: The description of this versioned and context specific conformity profile.

version.description: Version of this scheme following SemVer best practice (major.minor.patch).

validFrom.description: The data from which this scheme version is valid.

status.description: The status of this conformity profile (draft, active, deprecated)

subjectType.description: The type of the subject of assessments made under this conformity profile (eg product, facility, organisation)

standardAlignment.description: A list of voluntary standards referenced by this conformity profile and against which some level of compliance can be inferred for subjects that pass an assessment.

regulatoryAlignment.description: A list of regulations or legally binding conventions referenced by this conformity profile and against which some level of compliance can be inferred for subjects that pass an assessment.

criterionScoringFramework.description: A list of named scoring frameworks that are applied by criterion within this profile.

documentation.description: A web page that describes this entity in detail.

id.description: Globally unique identifier of this conformity criterion. Typically represented as a URI SchemeOwner/CriterionID URI

name.description: Name of this criterion as defined by the scheme owner.

criterion.description: A list of criterion that are included in this conformity profile.

scope.description: A set of classification codes that may be used to categorize the applicability of this criteria - for example industry sector, jurisdiction or commodity type - based on a formal vocabulary.

id.description: Globally unique identifier of this conformity scheme. Typically represented as a URI SchemeOwner/SchemeName URI

name.description: Name of this scheme as defined by the scheme owner.

scheme.description: The conformity scheme under which this versioned profile is maintained.

description: A versioned conformity profile, managed under a scheme, which includes a specific list of versioned criteria. A conformity profile represents the precise scope of a conformity attestation.

id.description: Globally unique identifier of this standard. Typically represented as a URI issuer/standard URI

standard.description: The standard against which this alignment assessment is made.

alignmentLevel.description: A level of alignment with the referenced standard (exceeds, meets, partial,..)

StandardAlignment.description: A voluntary standard and an alignment level (exceeds, meets, partial).

id.description: Globally unique identifier of this standard. Typically represented as a URI government/regulation URI

name.description: Name of this regulation as defined by the regulator.

regulation.description: The regulation against which this alignment assessment is made.

alignmentLevel.description: A level of alignment with the referenced standard (exceeds, meets, partial,..)

RegulatoryAlignment.description: A national regulation or international treaty and an alignment level (exceeds, meets, partial).

name.description: A name for this scoring framework.  Must be unique within a scheme.

description.description: A full text description of the criterion that clearly specifies how compliance is achieved and measured.

score.description: A list of scores and ranks associated with this scoring framework.

ScoringFramework.description: A scoring framework used for performance level assessments against a criteria or scheme. For example forced labour performance might score A to D depending on the percentage of workforce subject to recruitment fees.

code.description: The coded value for this score (eg "AAA")

rank.description: The ranking of this score within the scoring framework - using an integer where "1" is the highest rank.

definition.description: A description of the meaning of this score.

Score.description: A single score within a scoring framework.

name.description: Name of the classification represented by the code

definition.description: A rich definition of this classification code.

schemeName.description: The name of the classification scheme

Classification.description: A classification scheme and code / name representing a category value for a product, entity, or facility.
